kinyarwanda.highlighted_phrases_are_potential_red_: 🚩 Interuro zagaragajwe ni ibimenyetso by'iburira bishoboka (ikigereranyo gusa, ntabwo ari icyemezo)—
kinyarwanda.welcome_to_the_ai_literacy_lab: Murakaza neza muri Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI
kinyarwanda.this_is_a_six_section_lab_about_how_ai: Iyi ni laboratwari y'ibice bitandatu ivuga uko AI ikora koko, aho itsindwa, n'uburyo bwo kuyikoresha utayemereye gukora ibitekerezo ugomba kwitoza.
kinyarwanda.six_sections_no_order_required_revisit: Ibice bitandatu, nta rutonde rukenewe. Subira ku cyose. Iterambere ryawe rirabikwa.
kinyarwanda.press_1_6_to_jump_sections_for_all_sho: Kanda 1–6 gusimbuka ibice, ? ku mahinanzira yose, T ku nyandiko z'umwarimu.
kinyarwanda.click_any_underlined_term: Kanda ijambo iryo ari ryo ryose ryashyizweho umurongo
kinyarwanda.glossary_definitions_pop_up_inline_the: Ibisobanuro by'inkoranyamagambo bigaragara mu murongo. Inkoranyamagambo yuzuye iri ku ntera ya buto imwe kuri banner.
kinyarwanda.the_live_demos_here_use_google_gemini_: Iyerekana ry'ako kanya hano rikoresha Google Gemini. Ntushyiremo amazina, nimero za telefone cyangwa ikintu cyihariye — amabwiriza ashobora kwandikwa n'utanga AI.
kinyarwanda.see_tokens_next_token_prediction_and_t: Reba token, ikigereranyo cya token ikurikira, n'ubushyuhe bikora.
kinyarwanda.a_gallery_of_real_feeling_ai_mistakes_: Igaragaza ry'amakosa ya AI asa n'ay'ukuri, hamwe n'uko buri kimwe kibeshya abantu.
kinyarwanda.weak_vs_strong_prompts_five_patterns_a: Amabwiriza adakomeye n'akomeye, uburyo butanu, no gusubiramo ako kanya.
kinyarwanda.12_phrases_identify_the_role_of_each_p: Interuro 12. Kuri buri kimwe, hitamo uruhare rukina (umuntu / umurimo / imiterere / uburyo / urugero / imbogamizi).
kinyarwanda.click_the_wrong_parts_of_an_ai_generat: Kanda ibice bibi by'inyandiko yakozwe na AI.
kinyarwanda.scaffold_vs_substitute_a_udl_framed_de: Inkunga cyangwa gusimbura — igikoresho cyo gufata icyemezo cyubatswe na UDL. Zana imimerere yawe.
kinyarwanda.one_page_printable_summary_of_the_whol: Incamake y'urupapuro rumwe rushobora gucapwa rwa laboratwari yose.
kinyarwanda.this_clears_which_sections_you_ve_visi: Ibi bisiba ibice wasuye, gusubiramo amabwiriza wabitse, n'ibitekerezo byawe bya UDL. XP wabonye ahandi muri AlloFlow ntizigira ingaruka.
kinyarwanda.the_ai_in_alloflow_is_not_magic_it_is_: AI muri AlloFlow ntabwo ari uburozi — ni umuhanuzi wa token ikurikira watojwe ku nyandiko nini. Iyi laboratwari yerekana icyo ikora koko, igihe itsindwa, n'uburyo bwo kuyikoresha utayemereye gukora ibitekerezo ugomba kwitoza.
kinyarwanda.see_all_glossary_terms_in_one_place: Reba amagambo yose y'inkoranyamagambo ahantu hamwe
kinyarwanda.live_ai_calls_are_not_available_in_thi: Guhamagara AI ako kanya ntibiboneka muri iki gihe. Iyerekana rizakoresha ingero zanditswe.
kinyarwanda.type_something_into_the_tokenizer_in_s: Andika ikintu muri mukora-token mu gice 1.

kinyarwanda.pass_all_5_comprehension_checks_one_pe: Tsinda ibipimo byose 5 by'ubwumvire (kimwe kuri buri gice cy'ibirimo).
kinyarwanda.visit_every_section_including_the_quic: Sura buri gice, harimo n'aho wareba byihuse.

kinyarwanda.powers_live_demos_here_it_is: itanga imbaraga ku iyerekana ry'ako kanya hano. Ni
kinyarwanda.llm_among_many_chatgpt_claude_and_othe: LLM imwe mu nyinshi — ChatGPT, Claude n'izindi zirahari, kandi buri imwe ikora ku buryo butandukanye ku bwiriza bumwe.
kinyarwanda.they_don_t_know_events_after_it_ask_th: — ntabizi ibyabaye nyuma yaho. Baza AI mu buryo butaziguye aho buhagarara niba ukeneye kumenya ku bibazo bijyanye n'igihe.
kinyarwanda.what_you_type_may_be_logged_by_the_ai_: Ibyo wandika bishobora kwandikwa n'utanga AI.
kinyarwanda.names_phone_numbers_medical_info_or_an: amazina, nimero za telefone, amakuru y'ubuvuzi, cyangwa ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose utakwandika ku rupapuro umunyamahanga ashobora gusoma.
kinyarwanda.this_lab_is_about_text_ai_the_same_ide: Iyi laboratwari ivuga AI y'inyandiko. Ibitekerezo bimwe bikoreshwa kuri...
kinyarwanda.they_hallucinate_hands_text_and_anatom: Bibeshya ku maboko, inyandiko, n'imiterere y'umubiri, nk'uko ibyitegererezo by'inyandiko byibeshya ku byukuri. Uburyarya mu makuru y'imyitozo bugaragara mu byo bishushanya.
kinyarwanda.can_clone_voices_from_a_few_seconds_of: Bishobora kwigana amajwi biva mu masegonda make yo kwandika. Ibyago by'uburenganzira na deepfake birakoreshwa.
kinyarwanda.newer_and_even_more_convincing_than_de: Bishya kandi byemeza kurushaho ku deepfake za mbere. Tekereza ko igice cyose kigufi gishobora kuba cyakozwe.
kinyarwanda.the_core_literacy_skills_check_sources: Ubumenyi bw'ibanze bwo gusoma — kugenzura inkomoko, kumenya igihe ijwi ridahuye no kwizera, gufata ibyavuye nk'umushinga ntabwo ari ukuri — byose bihinduka kuri ibi.
kinyarwanda.written_by_a_clinician_psyd_with_stude: Byanditswe na muganga (PsyD) atekereza abanyeshuri bafite itandukaniro mu mikorere y'ubuyobozi, kwitwararika, no kwiga. Igipimo cyo gusuzuma mu gice 5 ni igice imiterere myinshi y'ubumenyi bwa AI isimbuka — kandi ni cyo cy'ingenzi cyane.
kinyarwanda.your_prompt_or_the_model_s_own_previou: Ibwiriza ryawe cyangwa ibyavuye mbere by'icyitegererezo ubwacyo.
kinyarwanda.split_text_into_small_pieces_tokens_wo: Gabanya inyandiko mu duce duto (token). Amagambo, uduce tw'amagambo, ibimenyetso by'ihagarara.
kinyarwanda.assign_a_probability_to_every_possible: Ha amahirwe buri token ikurikira ishoboka.
kinyarwanda.temperature_picks_how_random_the_choic: Ubushyuhe buhitamo uko ihitamo ritunganye (reba ikibuga cy'imikino hepfo).
kinyarwanda.add_the_new_token_feed_it_back_in_do_t: Ongeraho token nshya. Ongera uyishyiremo. Kora ibi inshuro amagana.
kinyarwanda.everything_an_llm_does_is_a_loop_of_th: Ibyo LLM ikora byose ni uruziga rw'intambwe 5 izi. Ntabwo ari «gutekereza» — ni guhuza uburyo kuri token, kenshi na kenshi.
kinyarwanda.the_newly_sampled_token_becomes_part_o: Token nshya yahiswemo iba igice cy'iyinjizwa ry'intambwe ikurikira. Interuro imwe y'ibyavuye muri AI ni uruziga amagana nk'iyi.
kinyarwanda.how_far_from_the_top_pick: Kure kangahe ku ihitamo ryo hejuru
kinyarwanda.each_block_below_explores_one_of_these: Buri gice hepfo gishakisha kimwe mu ntambwe izi. Kanda chip iyo ari yo yose ujye ku buryo butaziguye.
kinyarwanda.which_are_pieces_of_words_type_a_sente: ari uduce tw'amagambo. Andika interuro urebe uko igabanywa.
kinyarwanda.the_dog_was_running_quickly_because_it: Imbwa yariruka vuba kuko itari inyibutse.
kinyarwanda.i_had_pizza_and_ice_cream_at_the_park_: Nariye pizza 🍕 na aiskirimu 🍨 mu ruganda 🏞️ uyu munsi!
kinyarwanda.the_paleontologist_misidentified_the_p: Umuhanga w'ibisigazwa yamenye nabi sikorupiyo y'ikinyoma nk'arthropod.
kinyarwanda.the_model_predicts_the_next_token_not_: Icyitegererezo giteganya token ikurikira, ntabwo ari ijambo rikurikira. Amagambo magufi asanzwe aba token imwe; amagambo maremare kenshi agabanywa (urugero Icyongereza "unhappy" → "un" + "happy"). Kwishyura na byo bikora bityo — amafaranga ya API abarwa kuri buri token, ntabwo ari kuri buri jambo.
kinyarwanda.all_the_llm_is_really_doing_guessing_w: Ibyo LLM ikora koko byose: gukeka token ikurikira izaba. Iyo ihawe imiterere imwe, ifite amahirwe kuri buri token ikurikira ishoboka.
kinyarwanda.controls_how_random_the_next_token_cho: igenzura uko ihitamo rya token ikurikira ritunganye. Hasi (0.2) = hafi buri gihe ihitamo token ishoboka cyane. Hejuru (1.2) = ihitamo mu murizo muremure, harimo token zidashoboka. Ibwiriza rimwe, ubushyuhe butatu—
kinyarwanda.low_temperature_is_right_for_facts_wha: Ubushyuhe buke bukwiye ku byukuri ("Umurwa mukuru w'u Bufaransa ni uwuhe?"). Ubushyuhe bwinshi bukwiye ku murimo w'ubuhanzi. Ibikoresho byinshi byo kuganira bya AI bishyira agaciro rusange ahantu hagati — ni yo mpamvu ibibazo by'ukuri rimwe na rimwe biyoba.
kinyarwanda.pick_any_temperature_and_any_prompt_ru: Hitamo ubushyuhe ubwo ari bwo bwose n'ibwiriza iryo ari ryo ryose. Rikoreshe ako kanya. Hanyuma ukoreshe ibwiriza rimwe ku bushyuhe butandukanye ugereranye. Guhamagara 5 bwa nyuma bigumaho bigaragara kugira ngo ubone uko ibyavuye bihinduka na buto.
kinyarwanda.live_ai_required_for_the_playground_th: AI ako kanya irakenewe ku kibuga cy'imikino — igereranya 3 ryashyizweho mbere hejuru rikoresha ingero zanditswe.
kinyarwanda.llms_don_t_know_what_they_don_t_know_t: LLM ntizi ibyo zitazi. Zikora token ikurikira yumvikana yizerwa cyane, ndetse n'igihe icyo gisubizo cyizerwa ari kibi — ibi byitwa
kinyarwanda.here_are_seven_failure_modes_every_stu: ). Dore uburyo bwo gutsindwa ndwi buri munyeshuri agomba kumenya.
kinyarwanda.the_date_its_training_data_ends_anythi: — itariki amakuru y'imyitozo yacyo arangiriraho. Ikintu cyose nyuma yaho ntikizwi, ndetse n'iyo icyitegererezo gikomeza kuvuga cyizeye. Kibaze—
kinyarwanda.what_is_your_knowledge_cutoff_date: "Itariki aho ubumenyi bwawe buhagarara ni iyihe?"
kinyarwanda.if_the_question_is_about_something_tha: Niba ikibazo kivuga ikintu gishobora guhinduka cyangwa cyabaye vuba, ntiwizere igisubizo cya AI nta soko ya web ako kanya. Ushobora no kubaza icyitegererezo mu buryo butaziguye aho gihagarara — akenshi kirabizi.
kinyarwanda.the_llm_doesn_t_have_a_truth_step_it_h: LLM ntabwo ifite intambwe y'«ukuri». Ifite intambwe yo «kwizerwa». Inzira imwe rwose ikora ibisubizo by'ukuri n'ibibi byombi — n'ijwi rimwe ry'icyizere.
kinyarwanda.could_be_about_anything: Gishobora kuvuga ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose.
kinyarwanda.picks_likely_next_tokens_has_no_fact_c: Ihitamo token ikurikira ishoboka. Nta kugenzura ukuri.
kinyarwanda.the_pattern_was_common_in_training_dat: Uburyo bwari busanzwe mu makuru y'imyitozo bityo icyitegererezo cyabikoze bundi bushya (ntabwo ari ugushakisha — ni bwo kigereranya).
kinyarwanda.fact_wasn_t_present_or_the_pattern_loo: Ukuri ntikwari kuhari, cyangwa uburyo bwasaga nk'ubwiza ariko ntabwo bwari bwiza.
kinyarwanda.both_paths_come_out_the_same_way_same_: Inzira zombi zisohoka ku buryo bumwe — ijwi rimwe ry'icyizere, interuro zimwe zoroshye. Inzira imwe rukumbi yo kuzitandukanya ni ukugenzura ku kintu kiri hanze ya AI.
kinyarwanda.same_prompt_three_different_models_rea: Ibwiriza rimwe, ibyitegererezo bitatu bitandukanye. Soma witonze — ubumenyi ni bumwe ariko ijwi, uburebure, no kwitonda birahinduka. Niba ishuri ryawe rigerageza n'icyitegererezo kimwe naho inshuti yawe n'ikindi, muzabona ibisubizo bitandukanye kandi byombi "byiza".
kinyarwanda.length_varies_by_10_words_one_model_le: Uburebure buratandukana ku magambo 10+. Icyitegererezo kimwe gitangira n'ibisobanuro, ikindi n'ingaruka igaragara. Kimwe kivuga neza "uburebure bw'umuraba", ikindi "amabara". Nta na kimwe cyiza kurushaho — ariko niba ukeneye ijambo ryihariye ku murimo, icyitegererezo wahisemo kizagira akamaro.
kinyarwanda.recorded_examples_for_teaching_not_liv: Ingero zanditswe zo kwigisha, ntabwo ari uguhamagara ako kanya. Guhamagara ako kanya hano bikoresha Gemini gusa.

kinyarwanda.trade_passages_with_someone_else_whoev: . Guhana ibika n'undi muntu — uwo ari we wese ufata amakosa yose ari mu duheto atsinda.
kinyarwanda.your_draft_use_brackets_to_mark_errors: Umushinga wawe (koresha [[uduheto]] gushyira ibimenyetso ku makosa)
kinyarwanda.e_g_mitosis_has_four_main_phases_proph: Urugero "Mitozisi ifite ibyiciro bine by'ingenzi: prophase, metaphase, [[telophase]], na anaphase. Mu gihe cya metaphase kromozomu zikurikirana [[ku ruhande rw'urwuri rw'ingirabuzimafatizo]] mbere yo gutandukana."
kinyarwanda.good_trap_passages_have_2_3_seeded_err: Ibika by'umutego byiza bifite amakosa 2–3 yatewe. Byinshi kuri ibyo bisa n'ubutabera bwo, bike cyane byoroshye. Bwira amakosa asa n'ashoboka kwizerwa mu isomo rya mbere.
kinyarwanda.the_barrier_you_described_sounds_mecha: Imbogamizi wasobanuye isa n'iy'imashini (kwandika buhoro, kwibuka mu bwenge, gushyiraho uburyo, gutunganya). Gukoresha AI gukura iyo mbogamizi ntabwo ari nko gutuma AI ikora ubuhanga ubwabwo. Komeza — ariko bika ibitekerezo by'ibanze mu ntoki zawe.
kinyarwanda.the_barrier_is_cognitive_and_the_skill: Imbogamizi ni iy'ubwenge kandi ubuhanga wise ni ubwoko bw'ubuhanga ishuri rigerageza kubaka (gutekereza, gukora, gutanga impamvu). Gutuma AI ikora ibi bisobanura ko usimbuka kwitoza. Tekereza: AI ishobora kukwigisha ubuhanga aho kubukorera? Ibyo bibisubiza mu nkunga.
kinyarwanda.the_barrier_is_cognitive_but_the_skill: Imbogamizi ni iy'ubwenge ariko ubuhanga wasobanuye bushobora kutaba ubwitozwa hano. Subiramo umurimo: bupima ubuhe buhanga bwihariye koko? Koresha AI kugabanya imbogamizi ku buhanga bwihariye, ntabwo ari ukubusimbura.
kinyarwanda.the_question_is_not_is_ai_good_or_bad_: Ikibazo ntabwo ari "AI ni nziza cyangwa mbi" — ahubwo "AI irimo gukura imbogamizi ku buhanga nkora, cyangwa irimo gusimbura ubuhanga ubwabwo?"
kinyarwanda.before_you_use_ai_for_something_run_it: Mbere yo gukoresha AI ku kintu, kinyuze mu bibazo bibiri ibi. Ibisubizo bijyana ku kimwe mu byavuye bitatu.
kinyarwanda.what_specific_skill_is_this_task_meant: Ubuhe buhanga bwihariye uyu murimo ugenewe kubaka?
kinyarwanda.is_ai_removing_a_barrier_to_that_skill: AI irimo gukura imbogamizi ku buhanga, cyangwa irimo gukora ubuhanga ubwabwo?
kinyarwanda.removes_barrier_go_ahead_keep_the_core: Ikura imbogamizi. Komeza — bika ibitekerezo by'ibanze mu ntoki zawe.
kinyarwanda.can_ai_coach_you_through_the_skill_ins: AI ishobora kukwigisha ubuhanga aho kubukora? Niba yego — busubize nk'inkunga.
kinyarwanda.doing_the_skill_itself_skipping_ai_her: Gukora ubuhanga ubwabwo. Gusimbuka AI hano bibika kwitoza ukeneye.
kinyarwanda.use_ai_in_a_way_that_helps_you_do_the_: Koresha AI mu buryo bugufasha gukora umurimo wowe ubwawe.
kinyarwanda.use_ai_to_do_the_work_for_you: Koresha AI gukora umurimo mu mwanya wawe.
kinyarwanda.now_compare_both_worked_versions_there: . Ubu gereranya verisiyo zombi zakozwe — nta ihitamo "ribi", ni ugutekereza kutagoranye kuri ubuhanga ubwo aribwo koko.
kinyarwanda.the_five_scenarios_above_are_common_bu: Ibihe bitanu hejuru birasanzwe ariko ikibazo nyacyo buri gihe kireba akanya kawe kihariye. Sobanura ikibazo cyawe, tanga ubuhanga izina, kandi tanga imbogamizi izina. Uzabona icyerekezo — ntabwo ari igisubizo.
kinyarwanda.e_g_i_have_a_biology_lab_report_due_fr: Urugero "Mfite raporo ya laboratwari ya biyolojiya igomba gutangwa ku wa gatanu kandi sinshobora kwibanda igihe kihagije kugira ngo nandike intangiriro."
kinyarwanda.e_g_writing_a_scientific_intro_that_st: Urugero "Kwandika intangiriro ya siyansi ivuga igitekerezo"
kinyarwanda.name_the_skill_this_assignment_is_prac: Tanga izina ubuhanga uyu murimo wigisha
kinyarwanda.3_what_kind_of_barrier_is_in_the_way: 3. Ubuhe bwoko bw'imbogamizi buri mu nzira?
kinyarwanda.live_ai_unavailable_here_the_heuristic: AI ako kanya ntiboneka hano — icyerekezo cy'ikigereranyo hejuru gikoresha ibisubizo byawe gusa, nta guhamagara AI.
kinyarwanda.download_a_markdown_report_of_your_pro: Kuramo raporo ya Markdown y'iterambere ryawe, ibipimo watsinze, n'amabwiriza wabitse. Iha umwarimu.
kinyarwanda.ai_literacy_lab_quick_reference: Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI — Aho wareba byihuse
kinyarwanda.alloflow_for_students_grades_6_12_clin: AlloFlow · Ku banyeshuri bo mu myaka 6–12 · Byanditswe na muganga
kinyarwanda.it_has_no_idea_what_s_true_only_what_s: Nta gitekerezo ifite ku cyo "ukuri" — ni icyo cyizerwa gusa
kinyarwanda.it_sounds_confident_exactly_the_same_w: Yumvikana yizeye kimwe rwose, cyaba cyiza cyangwa kibi
kinyarwanda.does_the_answer_cite_anything_verify_e: Igisubizo gitanga isoko? Genzura buri soko.
kinyarwanda.is_it_past_the_model_s_cutoff_use_web_: Byarengeje aho icyitegererezo gihagarara? Koresha ishakisha rya web niba yego.
kinyarwanda.any_math_redo_it_with_a_calculator: Imibare iyo ari yo yose? Ongera uyikore na mubaruzi.
kinyarwanda.sound_too_confident_ask_are_you_sure_w: Yumvikana yizeye cyane? Baza "Uri wizeye?" — reba niba igisubizo gihinduka.
kinyarwanda.ai_removes_a_barrier_so_you_can_do_the: AI ikura imbogamizi kugira ngo ushobore gukora ubuhanga. (Ngerageza. Tunganya ibitekerezo byanjye. Mbaza ibibazo.)
kinyarwanda.ai_does_the_skill_for_you_write_my_ess: AI ikora ubuhanga mu mwanya wawe. (Andika inyandiko yanjye. Kemura ikibazo cyanjye. Fata muri make aho gusoma.)
kinyarwanda.ask_what_skill_is_this_assignment_real: Baza: "Ubuhe buhanga uyu murimo upima koko?" Hanyuma ubike mu ntoki zawe.
kinyarwanda.i_am_a_grade_student_don_t_solve_this_: "Ndi umunyeshuri wo mu mwaka wa [umwaka]. Ntukemure iki mu mwanya wanjye — mbaza ibibazo bimfasha kubona igisubizo."
kinyarwanda.quiz_me_on_topic_one_question_at_a_tim: "Ngerageza ku [ingingo] ikibazo kimwe icyarimwe. Tegereza igisubizo cyanjye mbere yo kubaza ikurikira."
kinyarwanda.are_you_certain_this_event_actually_ha: "Uri wizeye ko iki gikorwa cyabaye koko? Tanga isoko."
kinyarwanda.explain_concept_using_only_middle_scho: "Sobanura [igitekerezo] ukoresheje amagambo y'ishuri ryisumbuye gusa. Nta magambo ya tekiniki."
kinyarwanda.alloflow_ai_literacy_lab_built_for_stu: AlloFlow · Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI · Yubakiwe abanyeshuri bakeneye AI nk'inkunga, ntabwo ari uko yasimbura.
kinyarwanda.back_to_ai_literacy_lab_home: Subira mu rugo rwa Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI
kinyarwanda.pick_another_answer_to_try_again: Hitamo ikindi gisubizo kugira ngo wongere ugerageze.
kinyarwanda.low_stakes_high_familiarity_high_sourc: Ibyago bike, kumenyerana kwinshi, ubwiza bw'isoko bwinshi. Kugenzura kutagenwe biracyari umuco mwiza ariko ushobora kwizera ibyavuye.
kinyarwanda.trust_most_of_it_but_check_one_or_two_: Izera byinshi muri byo, ariko genzura icyavuzwe kimwe cyangwa bibiri by'ingenzi ku isoko ryemewe mbere yo gukora.
kinyarwanda.treat_as_draft_every_concrete_claim_nu: Fata nk'umushinga. Buri cyavuzwe cyihariye (umubare, izina, isoko) gisaba kugenzurwa kwigenga.
kinyarwanda.high_stakes_or_low_source_quality_use_: Ibyago byinshi cyangwa ubwiza bw'isoko buke. Koresha ku gutekereza gusa; ntugaragaze ibyavuye bya AI nk'igisubizo cya nyuma.
kinyarwanda.medical_diagnosis_legal_advice_citing_: Gusuzuma indwara, inama z'amategeko, gutanga amasoko y'ibanze udashobora kugenzura — igikoresho kibi ku murimo. Koresha umuhanga w'umuntu cyangwa isoko ryemewe.
kinyarwanda.trust_calibration_how_much_should_i_tr: 🔬 Kuringaniza icyizere — nizere iki gisubizo kangahe?
kinyarwanda.set_task_familiarity_stakes_source_qua: Shyiraho kumenyerana n'umurimo, ibyago, ubwiza bw'isoko, n'icyizere icyitegererezo cyatangaje. Kekereza aho urugero rw'icyizere ruguera. Nta manota, nta bugaragaza.
kinyarwanda.your_hypothesis_which_slider_should_we: Igitekerezo cyawe (ni iyihe siraida ikwiye kugira uburemere bwinshi mu rugero? Icyizere cyatangajwe gifite akamaro hano?)
kinyarwanda.e_g_stakes_should_dominate_everything_: Urugero, ibyago bikwiye kuganza byose — byizeye ariko bibi ku byago bike < bidashidikanya ariko byiza ku byago byinshi...
kinyarwanda.why_does_your_familiarity_matter_what_: Impamvu kumenyerana kwawe gufite akamaro? Ni iki icyitegererezo gishobora kutamenya cyo wowe ushobora kumenya?
kinyarwanda.when_llms_report_95_confidence_what_do: Iyo LLM zitangaza icyizere cya 95%, bisobanura iki koko? Ese zaringanijwe?
kinyarwanda.when_should_you_never_use_an_llm_regar: Ni ryari utagomba na rimwe gukoresha LLM utitaye ku bwiza bw'isoko?
kinyarwanda.how_would_your_trust_threshold_differ_: Ni gute urugero rwawe rw'icyizere rwahinduka ku ihamya y'imibare ugereranije n'inyandiko y'ubuhanzi ugereranije n'isoko?
kinyarwanda.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_yie: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu iri huriro ritanga iyi mimerere y'icyizere.
kinyarwanda.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'iperereza — nta manota, nta bugaragaza, nta gisubizo gitanzwe. Formula y'icyizere ni ikigereranyo, ntabwo ari urugero rwasohotswe. LLM ntiziringanijwe neza — icyizere cyatangajwe akenshi kizanura ku kuri. Genzura ibyavuye by'ibyago byinshi buri gihe ku masoko yemewe.
kinyarwanda.ai_literacy_lab_main_content: Ibikubiye by'ingenzi bya Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI
kinyarwanda.something_went_wrong_rendering_this_se: Hari ikintu kitagenze neza mu kwerekana iki gice. Genzura console kubona ibisobanuro.
